diagnostic.shareSubtext: Share the quiz page and discover your friends' types!
diagnostic.shareIntro: Discover your type with {title}! Try it with friends

types.ctaDescription: Answer {questionCount} questions to find your type

snsBrainType.title: SNS Brain Type
snsBrainType.description: Discover your SNS brain type from 16 personality types based on how you use social media.

loveLanguage.title: Love Language Type
loveLanguage.description: Analyze your behavior patterns in romance. Do you confess first or wait? Discover your love style.

commStyle.title: Communication Style
commStyle.description: Diagnose your conversation habits and social style. Good listener or great talker? Find out.

oshiKatsu.title: Fan Activity Type
oshiKatsu.description: Your fandom style reveals your personality! Merch collector? Event goer? Evangelist? Find your type.

stressType.title: Stress Battery Type
stressType.description: Analyze your stress tolerance and energy recovery. What charges you up, and what drains you?

nightMorning.title: Night Owl or Early Bird
nightMorning.description: Are you truly a night person, morning person, or somewhere in between? Find your peak focus time.

moneySense.title: Money Sense Type
moneySense.description: Saver? Investor? Splurger? Discover the values and personality behind your spending habits.

travelStyle.title: Travel Style Type
travelStyle.description: Detailed planner or spontaneous explorer? Classify your travel psychology into 16 types.

leaderType.title: Leadership Type
leaderType.description: Lead from the front or support from behind? Analyze your team role and leadership style.

studyType.title: Study Style Type
studyType.description: What's the best way for you to study? Memorizer, analyzer, or hands-on learner? Find out.

petMatch.title: Your Spirit Animal
petMatch.description: Based on your personality and habits, which animal are you most like? The result may surprise you.

foodPersonality.title: Food Personality
foodPersonality.description: Your food preferences reveal your hidden psychology. Sweet tooth? Spice lover? Or something else?

workStyle.title: Work Style Type
workStyle.description: Remote or office? Your ideal work style and professional approach classified into 16 types.

musicSoul.title: Music Soul Type
musicSoul.description: How you listen to and enjoy music reveals your hidden personality and sensibility type.

friendshipType.title: Friendship Style
friendshipType.description: Wide and shallow, or narrow and deep? Analyze your friendship patterns and social tendencies.

sleepAnimal.title: Sleep Animal Type
sleepAnimal.description: What animal matches your sleep pattern? A comprehensive look at how you fall asleep and wake up.

angerType.title: Anger Trigger Type
angerType.description: What makes you angry and how do you express it? Understand your anger patterns.

creativeType.title: Creative Brain Type
creativeType.description: What kind of creative are you? Logical or intuitive? Discover the source of your inspiration.
